calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of San Francisco.
Raymond E. Rogers, Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Tiffany L. Wilson.
Default was entered against defendant on March 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Tiffany L. Wilson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $8,867.81.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,178.10.
Attorney's Fees - $2,827.00.
Costs - $1,083.60.

Total - $13,956.51.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
